title: agrostis alba var. castellana
intro: Agrostis alba var. castellana, also known as White Bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis alba var. castellana include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and injuries.
